## Sensitive Surface Review

Mark every area touched by this PR.

- [ ] Private key generation, storage, export, rotation, or deletion
- [ ] Local JWT or auth middleware
- [ ] TLS issuance, certificate storage, or HTTPS behavior
- [ ] Reverse proxy request handling or identity headers
- [ ] Local config persistence or filesystem permissions
- [ ] Installer, service unit, or deployment script
- [ ] Network exposure, DNS behavior, or ward routing
- [ ] None of the above

If any sensitive area is checked, explain the risk and mitigation:
